title: HII is Awarded Electromagnetic Spectrum Contract to Support DOD CIO
text: MCLEAN, Va., July 25, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Mission Technologies division has been awarded a task order to provide spectrum assessments across technical, policy and strategy areas for the Department of Defense Chief Information Officer.

title: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding Awarded DDG(X) Design Engineering Contract
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., July 22, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE:HII) announced today that its Ingalls Shipbuilding division has been awarded a cost-plus-incentive-fee contract for engineering and design from the U.S. Navy for the next-generation guided-missile destroyer (DDG(X)) program.

title: HII Positions Senior Team to Accelerate Newport News Shipbuilding Transformation and Execution
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., July 20, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- All-domain defense and technologies partner HII's (NYSE: HII) Newport News Shipbuilding division announced today several promotions designed to optimize its shipyard operations and accelerate execution.

title: The Best Defense Stock to Buy Now
text: Huntington Ingalls Industries has the means to weather the macroeconomic storm and keep its ship-building going.

title: Amphibious Transport Dock Fort Lauderdale (LPD 28) Sails Away From Ingalls Shipbuilding
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., July 11, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- San Antonio-class amphibious transport dock Fort Lauderdale (LPD 28) departed from HII's (NYSE:HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division on Monday, en route to its commissioning site in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.

title: HII Hits Milestone on John F. Kennedy (CVN 79) Carrier
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., July 11, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII), America's only builder of nuclear-powered aircraft carriers and leading provider of mission-driven defense technologies, announced today that its Newport News Shipbuilding division has reached a significant milestone in the compartment and systems construction of aircraft carrier John F. Kennedy (CVN 79).

title: HII to Host Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call and Webcast on Aug. 4
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., July 07, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE:HII) will release its second quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday, Aug. 4, and host an earnings conference call at 9 a.m. Eastern time the same day. The call will be webcast live on HII's website: https://www.hii.com/.

title: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding to Hire 2,000-Plus Full-Time Shipbuilders
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., July 06, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global defense and technologies partner HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that the company's Ingalls Shipbuilding division plans to hire over 2,000 full-time shipbuilders as part of its future workforce plans.
